title: Ice Roads
description:
Makes:
- Ice look like Grey Concrete Powder
- Packed Ice look like Grey Wool
- Blue Ice look like Grey Concrete
body:
## What it does
This Resource Pack just makes all ices look like all grey concretes and wool.

## Key
- **Ice** - Grey Concrete Powder
- **Packed Ice** - Grey Wool
- **Blue Ice** - Grey Concrete

## Ideas for what it could be used for
This could be used for:

- Making roads for boats
- Minigames
- Traps
- Hating the Ice texture
- Race Tracks

I hope you enjoy this pack, I originally made it for my Youtube series on my channel ([https://www.youtube.com/@TomatoFacex1](https://www.youtube.com/@TomatoFacex1)) but decided to share it with all of you wonderful people too.

The use of the word "wonderful" was made to persuade you to download it.
